title.en: This is the attack power of the Ghost Fox Emper...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor turned into countless afterimages, each of which had a certain attack, and countless afterimages slashed at the Fire Emblem War Ancestor with a black knife in their hands.

Tear !!!!!

Countless voids were shattered, and the power of this blow reached an incomparably terrifying level, and I am afraid that tens of thousands of invincible domain ancestors would be killed in an instant.

This is the attack power of the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor!

However, the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor was very calm, and a fiery red cover appeared on his body, and mysterious lines appeared on the red cover.

As soon as this fiery red cover came out, no matter how the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor attacked, he couldn't help the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor.

If you don't break the defense, it's embarrassing!

"Impossible!"

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor was struck and couldn't believe this scene.

When he thought about it, he thought that his strength was not weaker than that of the Fire Emblem Emperor Ancestor, and now he couldn't even beat a clone of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor, and he didn't believe it.

"Taichen Sword!"

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor summoned this holy relic, this is the top 100 holy relics on the holy relics list, and the power is extremely terrifying.

As soon as the Taichen sword came out, the momentum of the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor skyrocketed.

"Taichen Sword, you even used it, it seems that you are really going to fight, then don't blame me for not giving your father face!"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor was serious.

I saw that the Fire Emblem War Ancestor had turned into a terrifying giant standing above the sea, as if it could be called the size of a domain realm, and its aura had also reached the level of terror.

Immediately, the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor pointed a finger towards the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor.

And the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor also held the Taichen Sword and stabbed towards the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, and the Taichen Sword collided with one of the fingers of the Fire Pattern War Ancestor.

In the next moment, the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor's Taichen sword collapsed and flew away, and the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor was also knocked away from an unknown number of territories, and was almost knocked out of the sea range.

At this time, the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor kept coughing up blood, and his whole body began to crack, such an injury was not a minor injury for him, but a rather serious injury.

"Ancestral technique, impossible, how can you practice ancestral technique!!"

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor roared.

At this time, the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor returned to its original appearance, crossed the void in one step, and came to the front of the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor, and said, "Is it strange that I have practiced the Ancestral Technique? Although you became a Peerless Domain Ancestor earlier than me, you have never entered the Holy Gate, you don't know the background of the Holy Gate, and you don't know the Peerless Domain Ancestor of the Holy Gate, which is far from being comparable to a casual cultivation Peerless Domain Ancestor like you. If you completely accept your father's cultivation, you may still be qualified to fight with me today, but it's a pity that you gave up all this and chose to cultivate by yourself, and you still think that your strength is very strong, but you don't know that other superior domain ancestors are unwilling to fight with you, and they don't want to offend your father!"

"I throw in the towel!"

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor said lonely.

The Fire Pattern Emperor Ancestor had mastered the Ancestral Technique, and he would not be able to win the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor no matter what, unless he was far superior to the Fire Pattern Emperor Ancestor in other aspects, but that was simply unrealistic.

"Make an oath, from today onwards, you will no longer be allowed to target the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, and the Ghost Fox Organization needs to make compensation, an ice crystal yacon, how about it?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

"Good!"

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor gritted his teeth and said.

Making an oath not to target the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor was nothing to him, but if he lost an ice crystal yacon, the loss would be great.

An Ice Crystal Snow Lotus Fruit can completely create an Invincible Domain Ancestor, and the effect is many times more precious than the Soul Saint Realm Flower, which has this significant effect on the Soul Holy Light, but the Soul Saint Realm Flower is not very helpful in improving the Soul Holy Light.

Moreover, the Ghost Fox Organization has fallen multiple four-star kings this time.

It can be said that the Ghost Fox Organization has suffered heavy losses this time.

Wow!

Ye Tian was moved over and appeared in front of the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor.

At this time, the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor made an oath, and after dropping an ice crystal yacon fruit, it disappeared in an instant.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, this is the Ice Crystal Snow Lotus Fruit of the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor, it is the opportunity he once obtained in a treasure land, and now it is estimated that there are few of them, let him lose one, he is afraid that he will be distressed for a long time!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor said with a smile.

"Thank you, Lord Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Immediately, Ye Tian accepted the ice crystal yacon.

"Lord Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, isn't that holy skill you performed just now?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

He knew a lot about the holy skills, after all, he had practiced many holy skills, and cultivated them to the limit one by one, if it was any unfamiliar holy skill, he could detect it.

But the method used by the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor is definitely not a holy skill, but it is much more powerful than the holy skill, and it must be something above the holy skill.

But he didn't know anything about the holy skills, and he couldn't find out about the battle gate.

In fact, many secrets about the Higher-Level Domain Ancestor and above are not allowed to be disseminated, and it is difficult to know unless they are personally known from the mouth of the Domain-level Ancestor of the Higher-level Domain.

The Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor was silent for a moment, and then he spoke: "Okay, it's okay to tell you, it's an ancestral skill that is above the Holy Technique! The Ancestral Technique is very difficult to practice, basically only the Ancestor can practice the Ancestral Technique, and there are relatively few people who can practice the Ancestral Technique among the Ancestors of the Superior Domain." "

"Do you need any conditions to practice ancestral skills?

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"How can there be any ancestral endowment, the holy endowment is the highest talent!" "The Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor said with a smile: "The Ancestor can easily practice the Ancestral Technique, if the Domain Ancestors under the Ancestor want to practice the Ancestral Technique, there are only two ways, one is to break the shackles of the Extreme Realm Holy Technique, in that case, the Holy Skill will transform into an Ancestral Technique." The second method is to thoroughly master an Ancestor Pattern, a complete Ancestor Path is divided into 3000 Ancestor Patterns, any Ancestor Path is the same, and the complete Ancestor Law can connect 3000 Ancestor Patterns in series, so as to become a complete Ancestor Path. If we, the Ancestor of the Superior Domain, do not have the Ancestor Method, it will be difficult to impact the Ancestor, but we have the hope of mastering an Ancestor Pattern, and through the Ancestor Pattern, we can cultivate the corresponding Ancestor Technique, so as to practice the Ancestor Technique. Of course, it's easy to say, but it's too difficult to practice, even if I have been cultivating for a long time, I have only practiced this ancestral skill!"

"I want to get an ancestral skill from the Battle Gate, what should I do?"

Ye Tian was curious about the ancestral technique.

After all, he had already cultivated the Holy Technique to the extreme, so he naturally longed for the Ancestral Technique.

"Let's wait until you become an invincible domain ancestor in the future, now for you, the ancestral skill is too far away!"

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor didn't say any more, but left.

"Invincible Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself.

Immediately, he also let go of the matter of the ancestral technique, after all, the most important thing for him now is to condense the holy soul, not to cultivate any ancestral technique.

Even if he really obtained the ancestral technique, if he wanted to practice the ancestral technique, he didn't know how many years it would take!

Therefore, at present, when he obtained an ancestral skill, it would delay his cultivation, so the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor did not tell him, lest he delay himself.

Wow!

Ye Tian also left Qihai and returned to the Battle Ancestor Realm.
